programName: Lead Service Line Replacement Owner Request Program
subsidyType: owner request pathway with city payment on the public side and owner payment rules on the private side
publicSideCovered: yes Milwaukee Water Works pays the public side
privateSideCovered: yes owner pays the lesser of actual private-side cost or the annual average
propertyRules: only owners of 1-4 unit residential properties with no commercial use are eligible
contractorRules: city selects approved properties each year and handles scheduling
